content.full_text:
FPPC PO Box 242
Capperopolis CA 95228
JAN 2 3 1991 January 22, 1991


Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento CA 95814

Attn: Legal Department

Dear Sir:

In the general election on November 6, 1991, I was elected
Supervisor for District 5 in Calaveras County. My campaign
committee has money remaining in it's bank account.

In reading the 1990 Information Manual I received from your
office last year, I find on pages 21-23 that campaign funds may
be used for officeholder expenses within certain restrictions.

What are the latest regulations and restrictions on the use of
campaign funds for officeholder expenses? I would appreciate an
answer to this question.

Sincerely,

Richard G. (Dick) Gordon

1

A cod of
